description: These slip-ons from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear. The simple design is complemented with colourful straps and is perfect when teamed with casuals. Upper T-strap with colourful leather straps covering the midfoot for a snug Fit Soft lining for added style Textured footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added style Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured design on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for added comfort Slipper Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
